candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement subtotal, not balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest/minority interest balance sheet line is present. Since BE uses total equity, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
